changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 18 18:00): ZERO de-escalation signals. Iran FM calls diplomacy 'delusional'. Hormuz effectively blockaded. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran. Lebanon ground invasion expanding. Oil >$100. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: IDF pushes deeper into south Lebanon, targets Khiam - says troops staying months
latest_news.source: Times of Israel / JPost / Al Jazeera
latest_news.text: IDF ground forces push deeper into southern Lebanon targeting Khiam. Chief of Staff Zamir says army determined to deepen operation. Israel says troops will remain for months.

latest_news.headline: 5 Lebanese Army soldiers wounded in Israeli strike - 1 dies
latest_news.text: Five Lebanese Army soldiers wounded in strike on Qaqaiyat al-Jisr. One later died. Lebanese state military directly taking casualties.

latest_news.headline: Trump says he does not need NATO help for Hormuz - going unilateral
latest_news.text: Trump reverses course: says US does not need NATO help to reopen Hormuz. Previously pressured allies with threats. Germany, Japan, Australia already declined.

latest_news.headline: US jets target Kharg Island oil hub - Fujairah fire burns day 2
latest_news.text: US jets strike Kharg Island, Iran main oil export terminal. Fujairah Oil Industry Zone fire still burning. 21st vessel incident in Gulf waters since war began.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 20:04 UTC) - Israel ground invasion expanding: IDF targets Khiam, months-long presence. 5 Lebanese soldiers wounded. 1M+ displaced. US strikes Kharg Island. Fujairah fire day 2. Trump reverses NATO stance, going unilateral on Hormuz. NCTC Director Kent resigned. 21 vessel incidents. Zero ceasefire signals.
